title: Sharing docs created from the Files column
excerpt:
When creating WorkDocs in the Files column, we need to be able to share the document with our team, so they can stay updated on project notes. 
Currently, the share icon is not available on docs created using the Files c…

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
When creating WorkDocs in the Files column, we need to be able to share the document with our team, so they can stay updated on project notes.

Currently, the share icon is not available on docs created using the Files column.

image1920×765 53.5 KB

posts.author: kirst (Kirst)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also see value in this! Have you found any solution or update on this?

I currently have a board that has a files column where the monday doc is created using a doc template and the information on it is pulled from the boards columns. There are over a hundred items on the board so it’s not feasible to manually create each doc. Even is we did manually create each doc, then we would have to update the information in two place - one time in the doc and again in the board item.

It would be amazing if we could make the monday docs created in the files column shareable via a link.
